Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We're counting down the 100 funniest videos of all time. Hope you're ready, because each one is EPIC!
Video.title: Episode 15

Video.summary: A girl stealing Easter eggs from her - sister, a baby pushing a cake off a table, and a boy with a bad haircut.
Video.title: Episode 111

Video.summary: A birthday hat gets stuck on the back of a baby's - head; a duck attacks a lady; a cameraman falls off a - boat.
Video.title: Episode 112

Video.summary: Videos include people playing basketball on donkeys; Yo-yo tricks; a little - girl who can't somersault.
Video.title: Episode 113

Video.summary: Pranks with chest waxing and a snake surprise—plus dogs doing the darndest things.
Video.title: Episode 1607

Video.summary: Tom Bergeron awards $100K and a Disney Cruise vacation in the biggest prize giveaway yet.
Video.title: Episode 1608

Video.summary: School mishaps, poolside pranks, a dog vs. crab showdown, and a boy who runs from his karate match.
Video.title: Episode 1610

Video.summary: Everyone knows the biggest disasters happen under your own roof. Get ready, it's the Home Disaster Zone!
